name: Penne with Tomatoes & Snow Peas
recipeIngredient: 12 plum tomatoes, skinned and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the garlic, scallions, and green bell pepper in oil over medium heat until the peppers are tender-crisp, about 2 minutes.
2. Add the mushrooms to the pan and reduce the heat to low. Sauté for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes and snow peas to the pan. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Cook the penne until al dente. Drain the pasta.
5. Stir the cayenne and tamari into the tomato sauce and spoon over the hot pasta.
6. Serve immediately.
